comment: "I found most interested learning about how big of an impact being in a low income environment is in the severity of burn injury outcomes."
"Chapter 4 is amazing. All the different cases and photos showing different presentations and different types and depths, very informative for assessing burns. Loved."
"Well-structured and informative, especially for practical burn management. Clear presentation of key concepts."
"A comprehensively clarified approach to burn patient management."
